<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_skin/styles.css" /><infobox theme="skin-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''{{#if: {{{rarity|}}} | <br/><span class="rarity-{{{rarity}}}" style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">{{{rarity}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <panel>
        <data source="parents">
            <label>Applies to</label>
            <format>{{{parents}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="is_universal">
            <label>Universal</label>
            <format>{{{is_universal}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="variant_count">
            <label>Variants</label>
            <format>{{{variant_count}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="flags">
            <label>Flags</label>
            <format>{{{flags}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="base_skin">
            <label>Base Skin</label>
            <format><code>{{{base_skin}}}</code></format>
        </data>
        <data source="color">
            <label>Color</label>
            <format><span style="display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;background:{{{color}}};border:1px solid #444;vertical-align:middle;"></span> <code>{{{color}}}</code></format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{api_name|}}}{{{dump_id|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="api_name">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{api_name}}}</code></format>
            </data>
            <data source="dump_id">
                <label>Dump ID</label>
                <format><code>{{{dump_id}}}</code></format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
This template displays a skin (cosmetic upgrade) in a Portable Infobox.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Infobox skin
|name = Display name (e.g. "Factory")
|api_name = Internal upgrade APIName
|dump_id = Stable upgrade ID
|parents = Wikilinks to parent gear/character (e.g. [[Scrapper]])
|rarity = Standard | Rare | Epic | Exotic | Contraband | Oddity
|color = Optional theme color (hex)
|base_skin = Optional parent-skin upgrade key inherited from
|flags = Comma-separated capability flags (VFX, Crab, Custom Model, …)
|variant_count = Total render variants (gear × preset)
|is_universal = Yes | No
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
